name: ICICI Manchester United Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Annual fee waived on spending ₹1,00,000 in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 2 PAYBACK Points per ₹100 spent on all retail purchases

additionalBenefits: Officially branded Manchester United credit card design
Access to exclusive Manchester United fan experiences and contests
Discounts on official Manchester United merchandise
pros: Unique Manchester United branded card design for fans
Access to exclusive MU fan experiences and merchandise discounts
Low annual fee of ₹499 with easy ₹1L waiver threshold
Simple rewards structure with no confusing categories
idealFor: Manchester United fans who want a branded card with MU perks
Users who prefer a low-fee card with simple rewards
Football enthusiasts who value exclusive fan experiences

faqs.question: What Manchester United benefits does this card offer?
faqs.answer: The card features an official Manchester United design and provides access to exclusive MU merchandise discounts, fan experiences, contests, and occasionally match-related offers. Specific offers vary by season.

faqs.question: Is this card worth it purely for the rewards?
faqs.answer: From a pure rewards perspective, no. The 0.50% effective return is below average, and there are no accelerated categories. The card's value lies in the Manchester United branding and fan perks rather than financial rewards.

faqs.question: Can I get lounge access with this card?
faqs.answer: No, the ICICI Manchester United Credit Card does not include any airport lounge access. If you need lounge access, consider the ICICI Coral (4 domestic visits) or Rubyx (8 domestic + 2 international visits).

faqs.question: How does the fee waiver work?
faqs.answer: The annual fee of ₹499 is waived if you spend ₹1,00,000 or more in the previous anniversary year. This is one of the easier waiver thresholds, requiring only about ₹8,333 in monthly spending.
